scripts.check: echo tsc: && tsc --noEmit && tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.server.json && echo eslint: && eslint
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:server
scripts.server: npm run build:server && npm run start:server
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.android:run: npm run cap:sync && npx cap run android
scripts.android:icons: node scripts/android_icons.mjs && npx @capacitor/assets generate --android && npm run cap:sync
scripts.android:build-signed: npm run cap:sync && npx cap build android
scripts.icons:web: magick images/icon1680cropped.png -define icon:auto-resize=16,32,48 public/favicon.ico && magick images/icon1680cropped.png -resize 32x32 public/favicon.png
